South Korea's Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026, Exceeding Central Bank Target** | YES | HIGH confidence

signals.headline: Solana ETF Inflows Continue on April 16 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana ETF Inflows Continue on April 16 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
U.S. spot Solana ETFs recorded $5.04 million in net inflows on April 16, 2026, following $5.36 million the prior day, with cumulative net assets reaching $835 million—this signals sustained institutional demand and could drive prediction markets on altcoin ETF adoption.[6]
